title: 12PCS Cream Colored Christmas Baubles, Cream Velvets Baubles For Christmas Tree Decorations, Flocked Bauble Ornaments, Shatterproof ChristmasBall Decoration, Glitter Ball Pendant With Hanging Loop
features: Flocking Material: Made of high-quality flocking material, they promise a more solid and safe decoration experience for your family, ideal for households with children or pets.
Full Package: Enhance your holiday decor with our 12 velvet Christmas ornament balls. Each piece in the set boasts a combination of flocking and glitter, providing a dazzling and look.

Delicate Velvet Touch: The velvet Christmas ornament balls add a sense of luxury and design to the decoration, creating a comfortable touch that will shine your guests. The glitter design gives a beautiful, soft and delicate touch
Present: These beautiful balls are perfect for giving daily surprises and sending care and blessings, making them a practical and thoughtful way to spread festive cheer this holiday season

Widely Applicable: These velvet Christmas ornaments balls are ideal for various occasions. Use them to decorate your home or add an extra pop of holiday spirit to weddings and parties. They increase the festive feeling of any event
